sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ بِلَالٌ أَنْ يَتَوَقَّفَ عَنِ السُّكَّرِيَّاتِ لِشَهْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Bilal je odlučio prestati s konzumiranjem šećera na mjesec dana.
sentences.translationEn: Bilal decided to stop eating sugar for one month.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْأُسْبُوعِ الْأَوَّلِ كَانَ الْأَمْرُ صَعْبًا عَلَيْهِ.
sentences.translation: U prvoj sedmici to mu je bilo teško.
sentences.translationEn: In the first week it was hard for him.

sentences.arabic: أَكَلَ الْفَاكِهَةَ بَدَلَ الْحَلْوَى كُلَّمَا جَاعَ.
sentences.translation: Jeo je voće umjesto slatkiša svaki put kad bi ogladnio.
sentences.translationEn: He ate fruit instead of sweets whenever he was hungry.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ الشَّهْرِ شَعَرَ بِتَحَسُّنٍ فِي طَاقَتِهِ وَوَزْنِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon mjeseca osjetio je poboljšanje u energiji i težini.
sentences.translationEn: After the month he felt improvement in his energy and weight.
